agentFile.format: Markdown file with YAML frontmatter (--- delimited) followed by a Markdown body; one agent per file; filename corresponds to the agent slug
agentFile.bodyIs: The Markdown content after the frontmatter is the agent's system prompt (persona and behavioral guidelines)

name.allowed: slug: lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, underscores
name.description: Unique agent identifier; used for @agent-name explicit invocation

description.description: Explains what the agent does; read by the main agent to decide delegation

kind.description: Whether the subagent runs locally or as a remote agent

tools.default: inherits all available tools if omitted
tools.description: Tool allowlist for the subagent (tool isolation)

mcpServers.allowed: MCP server configuration map (same structure as settings.json mcpServers)
mcpServers.description: Inline MCP server configurations scoped only to this subagent

model.description: Model override; 'inherit' uses the main session model

max_turns.description: Maximum conversation turns for the subagent

bashInjection.description: Executes a shell command and injects its stdout into the prompt; CLI prompts for confirmation; braces must be balanced; failed commands inject error message + exit code. Documented for TOML custom commands; not documented for the agent body (unverified for agent scope).

fileInjection.description: Embeds file or directory content into the prompt; images/PDF/audio/video encoded as multimodal input; directories recurse respecting .gitignore/.geminiignore; processed before shell and argument substitution. Documented for TOML custom commands; not documented for the agent body (unverified for agent scope).

argumentTokens.description: In TOML custom commands, replaced with user-provided arguments; raw outside shell blocks, auto shell-escaped inside !{...}. Without {{args}} the full typed command is appended after two newlines. Command scope only (unverified for agent body).

toolReference.description: In agent frontmatter, the tools array references tools by name; wildcards: * = all built-in and discovered tools, mcp_* = all tools from all MCP servers, mcp_<server-name>_* = all tools from a specific MCP server. Omitting tools inherits all tools.

mcpReference.description: Agents can declare inline mcpServers in frontmatter, scoped to that subagent; also referenced indirectly via mcp_<server>_* tool wildcards. Same server config schema as settings.json mcpServers (command/args/url/httpUrl/env/cwd/timeout/trust/includeTools/excludeTools).

variableTemplating.description: Path/variable substitution available in extension/MCP server configs: ${extensionPath} = extension dir, ${workspacePath} = current workspace, ${/} = platform path separator. Note: ADK-style {var} state templating is an ADK (SDK) feature, NOT the Gemini CLI agent body (unverified/absent for CLI agent files).

agentMention.description: Explicitly delegate to a named subagent by starting the prompt with @ + the subagent slug, e.g. "@codebase_investigator Map out ...". Auto-delegation otherwise uses the description.
